heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 130111 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)13011136:78j., , .June 17, 1959Pub. L. 86–47, § 1173 Stat. 79
